## 🐛 Bug Report

### Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

### Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

### Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

### Environment
- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS Ventura, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Browser: [e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17]
- Node Version: [e.g., 18.17.0]
- npm Version: [e.g., 9.6.7]
- TradingView Plan: [e.g., Free, Pro, Premium]

### Trading Configuration
- Mode: [e.g., Paper Trading, Live Trading]
- Broker: [e.g., Zerodha, Upstox]
- Strategy: [e.g., Trend Following, Mean Reversion]

### Console Errors
If applicable, paste any console errors:
```
Error message here
```

### Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.

### Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues
- [ ] I am using the latest version
- [ ] I have checked the documentation
